independent_vs_collaborative.high: You may prefer starting alone before group discussion.
independent_vs_collaborative.moderate: You may do well in either solo or collaborative settings depending on the task.
independent_vs_collaborative.low: You may gain energy and clarity by working with others early.

fast_vs_deep.high: You may enjoy fast reps, frequent wins, and shorter practice cycles.
fast_vs_deep.moderate: You may balance quick practice with deeper review.
fast_vs_deep.low: You may prefer slower, deeper sessions with time to reflect.

visual_vs_verbal.high: You may learn more quickly from diagrams, charts, and maps.
visual_vs_verbal.moderate: You may benefit from both visual and verbal explanations.
visual_vs_verbal.low: You may prefer text, explanation, and discussion over diagrams.

structured_vs_flexible.high: You may perform best with clear steps and predictable order.
structured_vs_flexible.moderate: You may adapt well to both structure and flexibility.
structured_vs_flexible.low: You may prefer open-ended paths and self-directed pacing.
